content.text:
I've reviewed the CLAUDE.md file and I'm ready to assist. I understand the key principles:

**Session Setup:**
- Sync with main branch first
- Validate current date from `<env>` section (Today: 2025-11-19)

**Core Philosophy:**
- Perfect foundation mindset (project is ~1% complete)
- Root cause fixes only
- Infinite initiative
- Complete logical units of work

**Workflow:**
- Create comprehensive task plans in `tasks/[feature-name].md`
- Get user approval before executing
- Document as I go
- Add review sections when complete
- Commit and push at end of session

**Quality Standards:**
- Privacy, Security, Beautiful UX, Performance First
- Bundle size < 100KB gzipped
- Type safety (no `any` for user input)
- Proactive quality checks before marking complete

**Current Status:**
- Git repo on main branch
- Recent commits show Phase 3-5 UI/UX improvements
- Untracked files: GEMINI.md, docs/gemini/

I'm Claude Code - ready to help with file search, code analysis, or task execution. I will be direct, logic-driven, and focus on optimal solutions over politeness.

What would you like me to work on?
